strategies.name: Pricing Optimization
strategies.description: Test different pricing tiers and positioning
strategies.implementation: A/B test pricing page layouts and value propositions

strategies.name: Upselling Strategy
strategies.description: Implement upsell flows for higher-tier subscriptions
strategies.implementation: Add upgrade prompts in teacher dashboard

strategies.name: Referral Program
strategies.description: Launch teacher referral program with incentives
strategies.implementation: Create referral tracking and reward system

strategies.name: Retention Campaigns
strategies.description: Reduce churn with targeted retention campaigns

strategies.name: Enterprise Sales
strategies.description: Target schools and districts for bulk subscriptions
strategies.implementation: Create enterprise sales funnel and pricing

experiments.name: Free Trial Length
experiments.hypothesis: Longer trials increase conversion but may increase churn

experiments.name: Pricing Anchoring
experiments.description: Test showing highest price first vs lowest price first
experiments.hypothesis: Anchoring with highest price increases perceived value

experiments.name: Payment Frequency
experiments.description: Test monthly vs annual vs term-based billing
experiments.hypothesis: Annual billing reduces churn and increases LTV
